arts.ttl: Premier League seals 5th place in 2025-26 UCL
arts.sum: The Premier League will have five teams in the Champions League next season after it secured one of the extra places for performance by its clubs.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca slammed for 'PATHETIC' Chelsea decision
arts.sum: Former Arsenal midfielder Paul Merson has slammed Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca for his team selection during the Blues’ 0-0 draw against Brentford on Sunday. Cole Palmer, Nicolas Jackson, Marc Cucurella, Pedro Neto and Levi Colwill were all named on the substitutes bench at the Gtec Community Stadium, with Maresca rotating his squad ahead of Chelsea’s Europa Conference League quarter-final first-leg clash versus Legia Warsaw on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea co-owner Todd Boehly has just been spotted meeting Donald Trump amid £775m masterplan
Merson: Maresca's XI at Brentford was pathetic, Chelsea need the CL!
arts.sum: Speaking in his latest column, Sky Sports' Paul Merson gives his verdict on Chelsea and Tottenham's upcoming Conference League and Europa League quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: The SHOCKING stat that proves Maresca is wrong about Chelsea
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has continuously praised his Chelsea side in recent weeks, despite their innate struggles to create clear-cut opportunities. In fact, Chelsea’s joint-top scorers in 2025 are surprise trio Tosin Adarabioyo, Marc Cucurella and Enzo Fernandez with a mere three goals apiece.

arts.ttl: Chelsea legend N’Golo Kante once dominated Real Madrid over two legs in the Champions League
arts.sum: Spanish giants Real Madrid are a real juggernaut when it comes to European football, but even they were helpless against the brilliance of Chelsea icon...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: 'Fresh contact' made over £42.8m defender as Enzo Maresca faces five-team battle
arts.sum: Chelsea make 'fresh contact' for a move for a former Arne Slot favourite in their attempts to beat Liverpool to the £42.8m deal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea lineup vs. Legia: Predicted XI for Conference League quarter-final first leg
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Chelsea could line up for their Conference League quarter-final first leg away to Legia Warsaw on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Legia Warsaw vs. Chelsea - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Conference League clash between Legia Warsaw and Chelsea, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
